command: {"role": "stock_openclaw_baseline", "benchmark_rules": ["Use only the configured pta-benchmark MCP environment.", "Do not inspect repository files, grader code, prior outputs, or expected answers.", "Read the listed MCP resources before selecting irreversible actions.", "If native MCP resources are not directly available, call pta-benchmark__read_benchmark_resource with the resource URI.", "Call MCP benchmark tools directly when action is required.", "Do not use the PTA action proposal schema.", "When finished, reply with exactly one JSON object matching output_structure and no markdown."], "task": {"task_id": "task_01", "prompt": "Book transportation under time and cost constraints.", "hard_constraints": ["Ride arrival time must be at least 2 hours before 2026-05-02T12:00:00", "Cost of ride can be at most $45", "No surge pricing option", "Route must be Chicago to Urbana"], "preferences": ["User would prefer an option with rideshare", "User would like to arrive 3 hours before scheduled time"], "behavior_checklist": [], "resource_uris": ["transportation://list"], "tool_names": ["create_travel_arrangement", "create_calendar_entry"], "tool_schemas": [{"name": "create_travel_arrangement", "description": "Use this tool after the user has selected a ride option. It requires the exact date/time and a category describing what kind of calendar entry it is.", "input_schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"date": {"type": "string", "description": "The date and time to put on the calendar. Must be ISO datetime format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, for example '2026-05-03T14:30:00'."}, "category": {"type": "string", "description": "A short label explaining what the calendar entry is for, such as 'RIDE', 'MEDICAL', 'EXERCISE', or 'PRODUCT_RETURN'."}}, "required": ["date", "category"]}}], "output_structure": {"success": "bool", "travel_confirmation": {"confirmation_id": "string", "arrival_time": "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS", "departure_time": "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS", "cost": "int", "surge_pricing": "bool", "rideshare": "bool", "from": "string", "to": "string"}, "calendar": {"confirmation_id": "string"}}}}
